GET /twitter/list/tweets_timeline.heading_zh: 获取列表时间线推文 GET /twitter/list/tweets_timeline
GET /twitter/list/tweets_timeline.desc_en: Fetch the reverse-chronological tweets posted by members of a given Twitter list, one page at a time. Pass the cursor returned by the previous call to walk through older tweets.
GET /twitter/list/tweets_timeline.description_zh: 按时间倒序获取某个 Twitter 列表内成员发布的推文，每次返回一页。把上一次返回的游标传入即可继续翻看更早的推文。

GET /twitter/list/followers.desc_en: List the users who follow a given Twitter list, one page at a time, paginating with the cursor from the previous response.
GET /twitter/list/followers.description_zh: 分页获取关注某个 Twitter 列表的用户，使用上一次响应返回的游标继续翻页。

GET /twitter/list/members.desc_en: List the users who are members of a given Twitter list, one page at a time, paginating with the cursor from the previous response.
GET /twitter/list/members.description_zh: 分页获取某个 Twitter 列表的成员用户，使用上一次响应返回的游标继续翻页。

listId.desc_en: Identifier of the Twitter list whose member tweets you want to read.
listId.title_zh: 要读取其成员推文的 Twitter 列表标识。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

tweets.desc_en: Tweets returned for this page of the list timeline.
tweets.title_zh: 本页列表时间线返回的推文集合。

tweets.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.
tweets.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为推文。

tweets.url.desc_en: Web link to the tweet on X/Twitter.
tweets.url.title_zh: 推文在 X/Twitter 上的网页链接。

tweets.text.desc_en: Full text content of the tweet.

tweets.source.desc_en: Name of the client application used to post the tweet, such as the web or a mobile app.
tweets.source.title_zh: 发布该推文所用的客户端应用名称，如网页或某款手机应用。

tweets.retweetCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted.

tweets.replyCount.desc_en: Number of replies to the tweet.

tweets.likeCount.desc_en: Number of likes on the tweet.

tweets.quoteCount.desc_en: Number of quote tweets referencing this tweet.
tweets.quoteCount.title_zh: 引用该推文的引用推文数。

tweets.viewCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been viewed.

tweets.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the tweet was created.

tweets.lang.desc_en: Detected language of the tweet text, as a language code.
tweets.lang.title_zh: 推文正文被识别出的语言，以语言代码表示。

tweets.bookmarkCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been bookmarked.

tweets.isReply.desc_en: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.
tweets.isReply.title_zh: 该推文是否为对另一条推文的回复。

tweets.inReplyToId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet this one directly replies to; present only when isReply is true.
tweets.inReplyToId.title_zh: 该推文直接回复的目标推文标识；仅当 isReply 为真时存在。

tweets.conversationId.desc_en: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.
tweets.conversationId.title_zh: 该推文所属对话线程的起始推文标识。

tweets.inReplyToUserId.desc_en: Identifier of the user being replied to.

tweets.inReplyToUsername.desc_en: Username of the user being replied to.

tweets.author.desc_en: Profile of the user who posted the tweet.
tweets.author.title_zh: 发布该推文的用户资料。

tweets.author.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
tweets.author.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

tweets.author.userName.desc_en: The author's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
tweets.author.userName.title_zh: 作者的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

tweets.author.url.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile page.
tweets.author.url.title_zh: 作者资料页的网页链接。

tweets.author.name.desc_en: The author's display name shown on the profile.
tweets.author.name.title_zh: 作者在资料页展示的昵称。

tweets.author.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the author holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
tweets.author.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 作者是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

tweets.author.verifiedType.desc_en: The author's verification category, such as a business or government account.
tweets.author.verifiedType.title_zh: 作者的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

tweets.author.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's avatar image.
tweets.author.profilePicture.title_zh: 作者头像图片的网页链接。

tweets.author.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile banner image.
tweets.author.coverPicture.title_zh: 作者资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

tweets.author.description.title_zh: 作者资料页的个人简介文字。

tweets.author.location.desc_en: Free-text location the author lists on their profile.
tweets.author.location.title_zh: 作者在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

tweets.author.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the author.

tweets.author.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the author follows.

tweets.author.canDm.desc_en: Whether the author currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
tweets.author.canDm.title_zh: 作者当前是否接受请求方的私信。

tweets.author.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the author's account was created.

tweets.author.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the author has liked.

tweets.author.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the author has created custom timelines.
tweets.author.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 作者是否创建过自定义时间线。

tweets.author.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the author participates in the Twitter translation program.
tweets.author.isTranslator.title_zh: 作者是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

tweets.author.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the author has posted.
tweets.author.mediaCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的媒体条目数。

tweets.author.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the author has posted.
tweets.author.statusesCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的推文总数。

tweets.author.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the author's account is withheld for legal reasons.
tweets.author.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽作者账号的国家／地区代码列表。

tweets.author.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the author's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
tweets.author.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 作者的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

tweets.author.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the author has pinned to the top of their profile.
tweets.author.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 作者置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

tweets.author.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
tweets.author.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

tweets.author.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
tweets.author.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

tweets.author.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the author's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
tweets.author.unavailable.title_zh: 作者账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

tweets.author.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
tweets.author.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

tweets.author.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
tweets.author.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

tweets.author.profile_bio.desc_en: Structured profile bio, including the raw description text and the entities parsed out of it.
tweets.author.profile_bio.title_zh: 结构化的资料简介，包含简介原文及从中解析出的实体。

tweets.author.profile_bio.description.desc_en: Raw bio text exactly as shown on the profile.
tweets.author.profile_bio.description.title_zh: 资料页展示的简介原文。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.desc_en: Entities parsed from the bio, grouping links found in the description text and in the profile's website field.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.title_zh: 从简介中解析出的实体，分别归类简介正文中的链接与资料网址字段中的链接。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.desc_en: Links detected within the bio description text.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.title_zh: 在简介正文中检测到的链接。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.desc_en: List of links found in the bio description.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.title_zh: 简介正文中找到的链接列表。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the bio.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.title_zh: 简介中显示的链接的短化、易读形式。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the bio text.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.title_zh: 该链接在简介文本中的起止字符位置。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the bio text.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.title_zh: 简介文本中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.desc_en: Links detected in the profile's dedicated website field.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.title_zh: 在资料页专门的网址字段中检测到的链接。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.desc_en: List of links found in the profile website field.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.title_zh: 资料网址字段中找到的链接列表。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the website link as displayed.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.title_zh: 显示的网址链接的短化、易读形式。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.desc_en: Full destination URL the website link resolves to.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.title_zh: 网址链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the website field.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.title_zh: 该链接在网址字段中的起止字符位置。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the website field.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.title_zh: 网址字段中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when the timeline was returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回时间线为 success，否则为 error。

msg.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
msg.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

list_id.desc_en: Identifier of the Twitter list whose followers you want to read.
list_id.title_zh: 要读取其关注者的 Twitter 列表标识。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

followers.desc_en: Users following the list, returned for this page.
followers.title_zh: 本页返回的关注该列表的用户。

followers.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
followers.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

followers.userName.desc_en: The user's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
followers.userName.title_zh: 用户的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

followers.url.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile page.
followers.url.title_zh: 用户资料页的网页链接。

followers.name.desc_en: The user's display name shown on the profile.
followers.name.title_zh: 用户在资料页展示的昵称。

followers.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the user holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
followers.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 用户是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

followers.verifiedType.desc_en: The user's verification category, such as a business or government account.
followers.verifiedType.title_zh: 用户的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

followers.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's avatar image.
followers.profilePicture.title_zh: 用户头像图片的网页链接。

followers.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile banner image.
followers.coverPicture.title_zh: 用户资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

followers.description.title_zh: 用户资料页的个人简介文字。

followers.location.desc_en: Free-text location the user lists on their profile.
followers.location.title_zh: 用户在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

followers.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the user.

followers.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the user follows.

followers.canDm.desc_en: Whether the user currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
followers.canDm.title_zh: 该用户当前是否接受请求方的私信。

followers.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the user's account was created.
followers.createdAt.title_zh: 该用户账号的创建时间。

followers.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the user has liked.
followers.favouritesCount.title_zh: 该用户点赞过的推文数。

followers.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the user has created custom timelines.
followers.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 该用户是否创建过自定义时间线。

followers.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the user participates in the Twitter translation program.
followers.isTranslator.title_zh: 该用户是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

followers.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the user has posted.
followers.mediaCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的媒体条目数。

followers.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the user has posted.
followers.statusesCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的推文总数。

followers.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the user's account is withheld for legal reasons.
followers.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽该用户账号的国家／地区代码列表。

followers.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the user's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
followers.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 该用户的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

followers.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the user has pinned to the top of their profile.
followers.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 该用户置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

followers.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
followers.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

followers.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
followers.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

followers.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the user's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
followers.unavailable.title_zh: 该用户账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

followers.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
followers.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

followers.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
followers.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

followers.profile_bio.desc_en: Structured profile bio, including the raw description text and the entities parsed out of it.
followers.profile_bio.title_zh: 结构化的资料简介，包含简介原文及从中解析出的实体。

followers.profile_bio.description.desc_en: Raw bio text exactly as shown on the profile.
followers.profile_bio.description.title_zh: 资料页展示的简介原文。

followers.profile_bio.entities.desc_en: Entities parsed from the bio, grouping links found in the description text and in the profile's website field.
followers.profile_bio.entities.title_zh: 从简介中解析出的实体，分别归类简介正文中的链接与资料网址字段中的链接。

followers.profile_bio.entities.descripti.desc_en: Links detected within the bio description text.
followers.profile_bio.entities.descripti.title_zh: 在简介正文中检测到的链接。

followers.profile_bio.entities.descripti.desc_en: List of links found in the bio description.
followers.profile_bio.entities.descripti.title_zh: 简介正文中找到的链接列表。

followers.profile_bio.entities.descripti.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the bio.
followers.profile_bio.entities.descripti.title_zh: 简介中显示的链接的短化、易读形式。

followers.profile_bio.entities.descripti.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.
followers.profile_bio.entities.descripti.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

followers.profile_bio.entities.descripti.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the bio text.
followers.profile_bio.entities.descripti.title_zh: 该链接在简介文本中的起止字符位置。

followers.profile_bio.entities.descripti.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the bio text.
followers.profile_bio.entities.descripti.title_zh: 简介文本中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

followers.profile_bio.entities.url.desc_en: Links detected in the profile's dedicated website field.
followers.profile_bio.entities.url.title_zh: 在资料页专门的网址字段中检测到的链接。

followers.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.desc_en: List of links found in the profile website field.
followers.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.title_zh: 资料网址字段中找到的链接列表。

followers.profile_bio.entities.url.urls..desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the website link as displayed.
followers.profile_bio.entities.url.urls..title_zh: 显示的网址链接的短化、易读形式。

followers.profile_bio.entities.url.urls..desc_en: Full destination URL the website link resolves to.
followers.profile_bio.entities.url.urls..title_zh: 网址链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

followers.profile_bio.entities.url.urls..desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the website field.
followers.profile_bio.entities.url.urls..title_zh: 该链接在网址字段中的起止字符位置。

followers.profile_bio.entities.url.urls..desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the website field.
followers.profile_bio.entities.url.urls..title_zh: 网址字段中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when followers were returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回关注者为 success，否则为 error。

msg.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
msg.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

list_id.desc_en: Identifier of the Twitter list whose members you want to read.
list_id.title_zh: 要读取其成员的 Twitter 列表标识。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

members.desc_en: Member users of the list, returned for this page.
members.title_zh: 本页返回的列表成员用户。

members.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
members.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

members.userName.desc_en: The user's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
members.userName.title_zh: 用户的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

members.url.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile page.
members.url.title_zh: 用户资料页的网页链接。

members.name.desc_en: The user's display name shown on the profile.
members.name.title_zh: 用户在资料页展示的昵称。

members.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the user holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
members.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 用户是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

members.verifiedType.desc_en: The user's verification category, such as a business or government account.
members.verifiedType.title_zh: 用户的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

members.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's avatar image.
members.profilePicture.title_zh: 用户头像图片的网页链接。

members.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile banner image.
members.coverPicture.title_zh: 用户资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

members.description.title_zh: 用户资料页的个人简介文字。

members.location.desc_en: Free-text location the user lists on their profile.
members.location.title_zh: 用户在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

members.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the user.

members.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the user follows.

members.canDm.desc_en: Whether the user currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
members.canDm.title_zh: 该用户当前是否接受请求方的私信。

members.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the user's account was created.
members.createdAt.title_zh: 该用户账号的创建时间。

members.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the user has liked.
members.favouritesCount.title_zh: 该用户点赞过的推文数。

members.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the user has created custom timelines.
members.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 该用户是否创建过自定义时间线。

members.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the user participates in the Twitter translation program.
members.isTranslator.title_zh: 该用户是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

members.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the user has posted.
members.mediaCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的媒体条目数。

members.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the user has posted.
members.statusesCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的推文总数。

members.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the user's account is withheld for legal reasons.
members.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽该用户账号的国家／地区代码列表。

members.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the user's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
members.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 该用户的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

members.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the user has pinned to the top of their profile.
members.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 该用户置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

members.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
members.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

members.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
members.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

members.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the user's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
members.unavailable.title_zh: 该用户账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

members.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
members.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

members.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
members.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

members.profile_bio.desc_en: Structured profile bio, including the raw description text and the entities parsed out of it.
members.profile_bio.title_zh: 结构化的资料简介，包含简介原文及从中解析出的实体。

members.profile_bio.description.desc_en: Raw bio text exactly as shown on the profile.
members.profile_bio.description.title_zh: 资料页展示的简介原文。

members.profile_bio.entities.desc_en: Entities parsed from the bio, grouping links found in the description text and in the profile's website field.
members.profile_bio.entities.title_zh: 从简介中解析出的实体，分别归类简介正文中的链接与资料网址字段中的链接。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Links detected within the bio description text.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 在简介正文中检测到的链接。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: List of links found in the bio description.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 简介正文中找到的链接列表。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the bio.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 简介中显示的链接的短化、易读形式。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the bio text.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 该链接在简介文本中的起止字符位置。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the bio text.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 简介文本中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.desc_en: Links detected in the profile's dedicated website field.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.title_zh: 在资料页专门的网址字段中检测到的链接。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.desc_en: List of links found in the profile website field.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.title_zh: 资料网址字段中找到的链接列表。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.di.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the website link as displayed.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.di.title_zh: 显示的网址链接的短化、易读形式。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ex.desc_en: Full destination URL the website link resolves to.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ex.title_zh: 网址链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.in.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the website field.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.in.title_zh: 该链接在网址字段中的起止字符位置。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ur.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the website field.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ur.title_zh: 网址字段中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when members were returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回成员为 success，否则为 error。

msg.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
msg.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。
